name: Pot Roast with Dill Pickles
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Bottom or top round roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the peanut oil in a large pot over medium heat until hot.
2. Brown the roast well, making sure not to overcrowd the pan. Remove the roast and set aside.
3. In the same pot, add the onions, dried mushrooms (if using), peppercorns, bay leaf, beef stock or bouillon, and chopped dill pickles.
4. Return the roast to the pot and stir to combine all ingredients.
5. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover and cook for about 2 hours, or until the meat is very tender.
6. Add the sour cream and continue to simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
7. Slice the roast and serve with the rich sauce on top.
